info.name: GMB Leads — Extension API
info.description:
All API endpoints for the Chrome Extension. Base URL: http://localhost/gmb_leads/api/extension

Auth: After login, copy the token and set it as the collection variable `token`. All authenticated requests use Bearer token automatically.

variable.description: Paste the token from the Login response here
Device ID returned from Register Device or List Devices

request.description:
Authenticate user and get extension token.

✅ Public — no token required.

On success the Test script auto-saves the token to collection variable.

Revokes the current extension token.

🔒 Requires Bearer token.

query.description: Optional. If provided, verifies device is registered and updates last_seen.

request.description:
Returns user subscription info, daily leads credits used/limit, and device count.

🔒 Requires Bearer token.

Registers a new device for the user. Fails if the device limit for the plan is reached.

- Free Trial: 1 device
- Starter: 2 devices
- Growth: 5 devices

🔒 Requires Bearer token.

Returns all registered devices for the current user along with device limit.

🔒 Requires Bearer token.

Removes (deactivates) a registered device by ID.

Set the `device_id` collection variable to the ID from List Devices.

🔒 Requires Bearer token.

request.description:
Saves scraped Google Maps leads. Checks:
- Device must be registered
- Daily leads limit (50/day for Free Trial, Unlimited for Starter & Growth)
- Duplicate leads are skipped automatically

**Fields per lead:**
- `name` (required)
- `address`, `phone`, `website`, `emails[]`
- `rating`, `total_reviews`
- `latest_review_date` — relative string (e.g. '3 months ago') or unix timestamp
- `profile` — Google Maps URL or place ID
- `opening_hours[]`, `social_links{}`, `reviews[]`

🔒 Requires Bearer token.
